title: Rideable Blazes
description: Allows you to equip a saddle onto a Blaze and ride it around
body:
# Rideable Blazes

Allows players to equip a saddle onto a Blaze and start riding it!

You have to be careful though, since even when saddled, they will still try and hurt you until you are no longer riding them. Once you're riding, you can punch Blaze to make it shoot 3 fireballs in whichever direction they are currently facing.

By default, the Blazes will set you on fire whilst you ride them, but that can be disabled in the config by setting `burnWhileRiding` to false.

Requested by Nekomaster of Infernal Studios!
